name: Spicy Beef Ribbons
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger root, peeled & minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into long strips, about 1/8 inch thick.
2. Mix remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Add beef strips to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. Weave 1 or more strips of beef onto each skewer.
5. Grill or broil, turning occasionally (2 to 3 minutes on each side) until desired doneness.
